image.title: NAP Rao, A Shukla, P Parmar, RM Rawal, B Patel, M Saraf, D Goswami

item.title: Reckoning a fungal metabolite, Pyranonigrin A as a potential Main protease (Mpro) inhibitor of novel SARS-CoV-2 virus identified using docking and molecular dynamics simulation.
